## Verification

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy --strict src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (coverage gate met)

## Tracking

- [ ] PR body references the tracking issue — `Refs #2` (or `Closes #2` for the final phase)
- [ ] **If this is a phase PR:** the matching `Phase N` checkbox in issue #2 is ticked on merge. Issue #2's checklist is the single source of truth for phase status — keep it current so docs that defer to it (e.g. `.claude/memory/friendex-migration-roadmap.md`) stay honest.
